ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., pipe, fitting, valve) */,
  "thread_size" TEXT /* Thread size of the product (e.g., 3/8-18 NPT) */,
  "od" TEXT /* Outer diameter of the product (e.g., (1.5) 1-1/2) */,
  "list_price" REAL /* List price of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for inventory management */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material the product is made of */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the product */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the product */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the product */,
  "min_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity that can be ordered */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was added to the catalog */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the warehouse contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the warehouse contact person */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the warehouse */,
  "current_inventory_value" REAL /* Current value of the inventory in the warehouse */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the warehouse was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the warehouse details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Inventory level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the inventory level reaches the reorder level */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal for the order item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company the customer represents */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the supplier is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the supplier is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the supplier is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_suppliers" (
  "product_supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-supplier relationship */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being supplied */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the product */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the supplier to deliver the product */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the product from the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product-supplier relationship was established */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product-supplier relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)
